headline: Despite Trade Barriers, Chinese EVs Will Pose Major Threat To American Automakers, Say Experts: 'Picture A Modern Day Godzilla'
summary: While Chinese electric vehicles (EVs) have been gaining popularity globally, their entry into the U.S. market has been notably restricted.

headline: Happy Birthday, ChatGPT: A Year In Review Of AI's Game-Changing Conversationalist
summary: OpenAI's ChatGPT celebrates its first anniversary, having rapidly gained popularity and evolved significantly, amidst a tumultuous month involving the temporary ousting and reinstatement of CEO Sam Altman and Microsoft securing a non-voting observer role on OpenAI's board.

headline: 'Hard To Argue Against' Tesla's Cybertruck But Rivian Has An 'Incredibly Compelling' Product In RIT: Analyst
summary: Tesla's Cybertruck, which launched last week, is a polarizing EV, but it's hard to argue against its performance, says one analyst.

headline: Mega Millionaire Kevin O'Leary Says He Spends $2 Million A Month Advertising Everywhere But X — And It's Not to 'Blackmail' Elon Musk
Apple's Break With Goldman Sachs, iCloud Security Concerns, Vision Pro Cost Cuts And More: This Week In Appleverse
New York Food Delivery Workers Win Big Against Uber, DoorDash And GrubHub With $17.96 Minimum Hourly Pay
summary: Food delivery giants in New York must now pay their workers a minimum hourly wage of $17.96, as per a recent court decision.
